title: Codex identity doctrine propagation claim
body: Opened claim 85bade29-db8f-4d6c-b59f-660215e92dc6 to propagate the completed Codex identity plumbing into plan closeout, continuation surfaces, and ADR/PDR doctrine. Owner requested this after implementation; edits will stay narrow around agentic-engineering identity, coordination, and platform-agnostic tooling surfaces.
